title: Embodied Navigation & Object Interaction
description: Annotate first-person video of agents navigating indoor environments and interacting with objects. Data trains embodied AI models for Habitat and similar simulation-to-real transfer pipelines. Contributors label spatial relations, navigation actions, and object states.

tasks.title: Record indoor walkthrough
tasks.description: Record a first-person walkthrough of an indoor space (home, office, store) lasting 2–5 minutes. Include object interactions: open doors, pick up items, move furniture.

tasks.title: Depth & object detection
tasks.description: Monocular depth estimation, object detection and tracking, room boundary segmentation.

tasks.title: Navigation + interaction annotation
tasks.description: Label navigation actions (move_forward, turn_left, turn_right, stop), object interactions (pick_up, put_down, open, close), and spatial relations (near, on, inside, next_to).

tasks.title: Trajectory consistency check
tasks.description: Action sequence plausibility, object state transition validity, spatial relation consistency.
